_comment: Ranker-regression expectations over data/seed.json + data/cooccurrence.json. CHARACTERIZATION values (what the deterministic engine produces for the default JOURNEY archetype at the trust>=0.50 gate), not hand-picked winners. Update deliberately when the seed, co-occurrence, or scoring changes, and record why. History: the science subgraph shifted Roman Empire's top to Mithra; the Hellenistic-India-Buddhism bridge (ADR 0011) then connected the science/India cluster into the Rome-Silk Road-China web; and the default journey cap was cut 6->4 (ADR 0012) for punchier, higher-trust chains. At cap 4 the winners are Roman Empire -> India (Rigveda a close 2nd, ~0.35 wow behind - a deterministic near-tie), Christianity -> Alexander the Great (leads by ~1.5), and a now-un-isolated Euclid -> Buddhism (leads by ~2.3). Re-characterise after any seed/co-occurrence/scoring change.
